channel.title: Comments on: Greg Koch, Stone Brewing – Ep. 58
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: Thanks Kendra and Bud for the comment. I appreciate you being regular visitors to my site! West Virginia rocks and is a good beer drinking state!!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Kendra and Bud for the comment. I appreciate you being regular visitors to my site! West Virginia rocks and is a good beer drinking state!!

item.title: By: Kendra and Bud Eggleton
item.dc:creator: Kendra and Bud Eggleton
item.description: We love this site! Even West Virginians know a good educational site when they see it. Best wishes, The Eggleton's
item.content:encoded: We love this site! Even West Virginians know a good educational site when they see it. Best wishes, The Eggleton’s
